# crowci_user_repositories_available (Data Source)

Fetches repositories visible from linked forges (both enabled and not-yet-enabled).

## Example Usage

```terraform
# All repositories visible across all linked forges
data "crowci_user_repositories_available" "all" {}

# Only repositories not yet enabled in Crow CI
data "crowci_user_repositories_available" "unenabled" {
  only_unenabled = true
}

# Scoped to a specific forge
data "crowci_user_repositories_available" "forge" {
  forge_id = 1
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `forge_id` (Number) Scope results to a specific forge ID. Defaults to all linked forges.
- `only_unenabled` (Boolean) When true, omit repositories already enabled in Crow CI.

### Read-Only

- `repositories` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories))

<a id="nestedatt--repositories"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the repository is already active in Crow CI.
- `allow_deploy` (Boolean) Allow deploy pipelines.
- `allow_manual` (Boolean) Allow manual pipeline triggers.
- `allow_pr` (Boolean) Allow pull request pipelines.
- `avatar_url` (String) Avatar URL for the repository.
- `cancel_previous_pipeline_events` (List of String) Pipeline events for which previous runs should be cancelled.
- `clone_url` (String) HTTPS clone URL.
- `clone_url_ssh` (String) SSH clone URL.
- `config_file` (String) Path to the pipeline configuration file.
- `default_branch` (String) Default branch of the repository.
- `deploy_team` (String) Team allowed to trigger deploy pipelines.
- `forge_id` (Number) Forge ID.
- `forge_remote_id` (String) Repository ID at the forge.
- `forge_url` (String) URL of the repository at the forge.
- `full_name` (String) Full repository name (owner/name).
- `id` (Number) Repository ID.
- `logs_keep_duration` (String) Duration to keep pipeline logs.
- `logs_keep_min` (Number) Minimum number of pipeline logs to keep.
- `name` (String) Repository name.
- `netrc_trusted` (List of String) Hostnames for which .netrc credentials are trusted.
- `org_id` (Number) Organization ID the repository belongs to.
- `owner` (String) Repository owner.
- `pr_enabled` (Boolean) Whether pull request pipelines are enabled.
- `private` (Boolean) Whether the repository is private.
- `require_approval` (String) Approval requirement for pipelines.
- `timeout` (Number) Pipeline execution timeout in minutes.
- `trusted` (Attributes) Trusted configuration for the repository. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--repositories--trusted))
- `visibility` (String) Repository visibility.

<a id="nestedatt--repositories--trusted"></a>
### Nested Schema for `repositories.trusted`

Read-Only:

- `network` (Boolean) Allow network access for trusted operations.
- `security` (Boolean) Allow security-sensitive operations.
- `volumes` (Boolean) Allow volume mounts.
